title: Polish Pork Skewers with Butter
description: Grilled pork skewers with a rich and buttery twist, inspired by traditional polish cuisine.

ingredients.name: pork shoulder, cut into 1-inch chunks
ingredients.notes: use a meat mallet to pound to 1/4 inch thickness

instructions: 2. Thread pork and sausage onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
3. In a small bowl, mix together butter, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
4. Brush the butter mixture onto the pork and sausage.
5. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the pork reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
6. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
